entity.summary: MegaETH concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange with V2 and V3 protocol surfaces, residual liquidity, and historical spot-trading activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party CurrentX application endpoint remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies CurrentX V3 as a MegaETH CLMM DEX with residual current TVL and historical cumulative DEX volume but zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. HEI consolidates V2 and V3 source rows into one entity and uses limited status.

evidence.title: CurrentX official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party CurrentX application endpoint remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: CurrentX V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies CurrentX V3 as a MegaETH CLMM DEX and reports residual TVL and cumulative volume but zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: CurrentX V2 and V3 DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies CurrentX V2 and V3 source rows on MegaETH; HEI consolidates them into one entity.
